creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption: What to do if you get lost in Central Park #nyc #NewYork #CentralPark #travel #visitnyc

transcription.text: Did you know that if you get lost in Central Park, all you have to do is look for a street lamp and look for this number. The first two numbers will tell you which street you're closest to. The second two numbers will indicate whether you're on the west side or the east side. If it's an odd number, that means you're on the west side of the park. If it's an even number, it means you're on the east side of the park. So in our case, we're on 67th Street on the east side of the park because we have an even number.
